description: Exports all item definitions from a workspace to a local directory (for CI/CD source control).
notes: Each item becomes a directory named '{DisplayName}.{ItemType}/' containing .platform + definition files. Use --overwrite to replace existing directory contents. Items that don't support getDefinition are skipped (reported in output). Use --item-types to filter. The exported directory is the --source input for 'deploy plan/apply'.

query_examples.description: Items that could not be exported with reasons.
